name: Customer & Sales
description: Customer records, orders, addresses, payment methods, store fulfillment, and sales reporting.

name: Product & Marketing
description: Product catalog structure, categories, seasonal items, promotions, discounts, reviews, and ratings.

name: Inventory & Supply Chain
description: Ingredients, inventory records, suppliers, invoices, recipes, waste, budgets, and expenses.

name: Employee & Operations
description: Departments, roles, employees, shifts, training records, and order assignments.

name: Catering & Delivery
description: Events, event types, catering orders, delivery assignments, and destination addresses.

name: Compliance & Regulatory
description: Nutritional information, allergy information, and customer allergy tracking records.
